title: Fakelorant
description: A beacon-planting, FPS minigame modpack entirely in Minecraft! (Totally not valorant)
body:
A tactical shooter, beacon planting minigame in minecraft! As red team, plant that beacon and make sure it blows up to win, or kill all opponents. As blue team, stop that beacon from being planted or defuse it at all costs.

Guns are from a custom TacZ gunpack made by me!



MAKE SURE TO JOIN THE DISCORD SERVER IF YOU HAVE ANY COOL IDEAS OR REPORT BUGS



Lore: The blue players have a bunch of resources stored around their sites, so the red players developped the SuperBeacon9000 to steal and teleport all those resources back to their base after detonating. However, the energy generated by it will vaporise anyone within its black radius.



Features (for now):

   +A custom map
   +(Omen) Blind: send a blinding blast that goes through walls and makes anyone in its path temporarily blinded! (not implemented into shop)
   +A (Sova) revealing dart that exposes all enemies it sees to your team (not implemented into shop)
   +A dash ability that allows for quick entry or escape (not implemented into shop)
   +A custom beacon to plant in site and detonate as well as defusing tool to defuse it
   +A team system with hidden name tags and scoring
   +Manual gun pick up from dead players 
   +A firing range to test weapon and aiming
   +A shop and economy system, with auto money per round.



NOTE:
+when you update to a newer version, most of the new features are added to the new world, so you should delete the old world before updating to avoid confusion.
+a game-related texture pack is disabled by default, enable it!
